laws.title: Secure Data Transmission
laws.description: All data exchanged between the user and the site should be encrypted.
laws.remediation: Ensure all connections are made using HTTPS and regularly inspect certificates for any issues.

laws.title: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Prevention
laws.description: User inputs should be properly sanitized to prevent XSS attacks.
laws.remediation: Utilize libraries or frameworks that offer built-in protection against XSS.

laws.title: Content Security Policy
laws.description: Implement a Content Security Policy to guard against a range of vulnerabilities.
laws.remediation: Set strict CSP rules and regularly update them to adapt to new threats.

laws.title: Session Management
laws.description: User sessions should be managed securely and have a reasonable timeout.
laws.remediation: Implement secure session cookies with the 'HttpOnly' and 'Secure' flags set.

laws.title: Password Policy Enforcement
laws.description: Strong password policies should be in place for user accounts.
laws.remediation: Require a mix of uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols in passwords.
